---
title: "Schedule"
format: html
---

This section provides an overview about what is happening and when over the 2 day bootcamp.
See the detailed daily schedules for more information.

## Overview

### Day 1

*Breakfast provided* {{< fa mug-hot >}} {{< fa bread-slice >}}

*Welcome*: [Rick Gilmore](directors.qmd#rick-gilmore) and [Alaina Pearce](directors.qmd#alaina-pearce)

*Presentation*: Research Data Stewardship Program, [Briana Wham](program-committee.qmd#briana-wham)

*Keynote*: TBD, [Melissa Kline Struhl](presenters.qmd#melissa-kline-struhl), Director, Children Helping Science

*Lunch provided* {{< fa bottle-water >}} {{< fa bread-slice >}}

*Discussion*: Uses and misuses open research data

*Hands-on workshops*

### Day 2

*Breakfast provided* {{< fa mug-hot >}} {{< fa bread-slice >}}

*Hands-on workshops*

*Lunch provided* {{< fa bottle-water >}} {{< fa bread-slice >}}

*Panel Discussion*: Open research data and AI ethics 

*Hands-on workshops*

::: {.callout-note}
### Social Event

TBD
:::
